performance_overview: Through 48 sessions (inception 2026-06-01) Bull holds the same 7 open positions (SCHW, PCG, XLU, CMG, GIS, META, BMY). Account equity ~$99,983 (-0.02% since $100K inception) vs SPY -2.06% cumulative — Bull leads the benchmark by ~2.04pts. Today (Jul 20 EOD) was a rare give-back: net -$343.02 (-0.34%) against a nearly flat SPY (-0.06%), a -0.28% single-day alpha — the first negative daily alpha in several sessions — driven almost entirely by a sharp idiosyncratic drop in CMG. Zero exits, zero entries, no death crosses. Unrealized book stays net-positive: SCHW +4.96% (anchor, strengthening from +4.05%), GIS +5.01% (still standout, eased from +5.62%), BMY +2.72% (Day 3, eased from +3.59%), PCG +1.44% (improved). Reds: CMG -5.74% (big deterioration from -1.55% — now the closest position to its stop, but in earnings blackout so GTC is the sole exit), XLU -1.54% (weakening, oldest position with no trend progress), META -1.66% (RECOVERED from -2.71% — the feared extended-entry pullback is stabilizing, EMA-20 retest holding).
best_signals: RSI 55-60 at entry: 2/2 wins (100%), avg +2.15% — the ONLY consistently profitable bucket for the LEGACY intraday RSI strategy; n=2, thin sample, informational only now that the strategy is MA-20/60 trend-following. Do not act on it without n>=10.

Shallow-cross probation entries continue to hold up under trend-following: GIS (0.29% cross, 75% unit) still +5.01% after easing from +7.46% peak, and BMY (0.13% cross, 50% unit) +2.72% on Day 3. Early positive read that a heavy size-down — NOT a skip — is the right call for shallow-but-non-earnings-adjacent golden crosses. Still only 2-3 samples; keep sizing down, do not upsize yet.
avoid: Shallow EMA cross entries on earnings-adjacent names: TSLA (Jul 7 entry, 0.06% cross spread, earnings Jul 22) lost -4.78% on exit. Rule: SKIP (do not size down) when BOTH shallow cross spread (<0.5%) AND earnings within 14 days apply simultaneously. This is the live rule under the current trend strategy.

Extended entries (price well above EMA-20 at entry): META entered Jul 15 at ~8.5% above EMA-20, peaked +2.83%, rolled to -2.71%, and has now recovered to -1.66% as the EMA-20 retest holds. Early evidence that chasing an extended golden cross buys the digestion/pullback but does not necessarily break the trend — the retest held rather than confirming a death cross. Treat large above-EMA extension as a size-down (or wait-for-pullback) caution. n=1, informational.

Very shallow golden crosses (<0.1% EMA-20/60 spread): NVDA (0.07%) skipped Jul 15 as a near-clone of the failed TSLA pattern (0.06%). Treat sub-0.1% crosses as noise-level, high reversal risk — skip on sight. BMY at 0.13% cleared this line by a hair, taken at half unit, and is working (+2.72%), validating 0.1% as the skip floor.

LEGACY intraday RSI buckets (informational, strategy retired): RSI 60-65 0/3, RSI 65-75 0/1, gap-up opens with RSI>60 — all losers historically. Retained only as a record of why the intraday RSI approach was abandoned in favor of trend-following.
recent_market_context: Jul 14-20: MA-20/60 trend strategy running steadily; 7 positions held, book net positive on unrealized. Broad market softened three of the last four sessions (SPY -0.82% Jul 16, -0.95% Jul 17, then near-flat -0.06% Jul 20). Bull's low-beta/defensive-leaning book (utilities, staples, healthcare, financials) beat SPY on both down days but gave back -0.28% today on a flat tape as CMG dropped idiosyncratically (~4% single-day) into its earnings window. No death crosses triggered across any position; no new golden crosses cleared filters (last scan's lone AMZN cross was noise-level and earnings-filtered). VIX last read 15.67 (calm) on Jul 16. Trending/choppy: choppy with a soft downward bias.

current_open_positions.notes: Day 14; stop $93.28 (fixed, 2xATR). Portfolio anchor — strengthened from +4.05% to +4.96%, the best-performing green in a soft tape. Full unit. No death cross.
Day 14; stop $16.29. Improved from +1.21% to +1.44%, holding green. No death cross. Full unit.
Day 14; stop $44.37. Slipped from -1.06% to -1.54% — the oldest position with no trend progress after 14 days. Lingering death-cross watch; ~$0.59/1.3% above stop, tightening.

Day 10; stop $32.27. SHARP DROP from -1.55% to -5.74% today (~4% single-day, likely pre-earnings positioning). EARNINGS BLACKOUT Jul 15-29 — GTC stop $32.27 is SOLE exit. Do NOT manually exit regardless of price or death cross. Now only ~$0.82/2.5% above stop — the closest position to being stopped out.
Day 6; stop $34.41. Best position in the book — eased from +5.62% to +5.01% but still the standout. 75% unit (207 of 276). Probation graduating well; keep holding, do not upsize.

Day 4; stop $613.58 (2xATR=$23.805). RECOVERED from -2.71% to -1.66% — the extended entry (8.5% above EMA-20) pullback is stabilizing, EMA-20 retest holding, no death cross. 75% unit (11 of 15). Still watch, but the feared reversal has not confirmed; ~$36.64/5.6% above stop.

Day 3. 50% unit (85 of 171 full), heavy size-down on the shallowest cross yet (0.13% EMA20/60 spread). Stop $55.76 (2xATR=1.4723). Eased from +3.59% to +2.72% but firmly green — the shallow-cross size-down continues to validate. Earnings confirmed clear within 14d.
